parsed_review.summary: CP00-771 read-only review complete: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS, no blocking findings.

findings.title: RP25 contract artifact is regenerated (written) during validation — confirmed control-plane-only, not product runtime
findings.details: The validator deterministically rewrites contracts/migration-platform-contract.json from the in-code descriptors on every run (writeFile at line 217). This is a deterministic control-plane/contract artifact regeneration, not a product-state write: grep across packages/migration/src found no fetch/db/fs/network/runtime calls, every descriptor carries MIGRATION_PLATFORM_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (writes_product_state:false, *_runtime_opened:false), and the committed contract's validation.valid:true / latest_pack:CP00-771 plus a clean `git diff --check` confirm the committed file already matches regenerated output. Consistent with imported_pattern=deterministic_control_plane_review_packet_and_receipt and hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false.
findings.recommendation: No action required. Continue treating the contract JSON as a generated control-plane artifact and keep it out of product runtime; the regeneration-on-validate behavior is the intended deterministic pattern.

findings.title: Pack production_ready is descriptor-scoped and correctly gated pending this review
findings.details: manifest.production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status=in_progress, and construction-inspection.verdict=PENDING_REVIEW / pack_level_claude_review_completed=false reflect the expected pre-adjudication state, not a defect. The pack's production_ready_flag 'migration_platform_fixture_permission_audit_descriptor_verified' is a descriptor-verification claim only; it does not assert runtime_ready or enterprise trust (descriptor.authority_boundary.local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, runtime_opening_pack_id=CP00-772). Coverage/descriptor validations are valid:true with empty errors, distributions match the baseline exactly, node --test (49/49) and npm test (2997/2997) pass, and all ten required validation commands exit 0 — evidence supports promoting the descriptor-verified claim at adjudication.
findings.recommendation: Proceed to adjudication and record this read-only review receipt. Do not interpret production_ready=false as a blocker; final human approval remains required before any runtime/enterprise-trust opening in CP00-772+.
